                                   S. S. ROBISON,

Santo Domingo, D. R.
September 3, 1921.

     MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
               Executive Order No. 667.
                  APPROPRIATION O F FUNDS,.
                        0. G. No. 3256.

    By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
.ofSanto Domingo, t h e following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
     ARTICLE 1. There is hereby appropriated from any
 funds in the National Treasury not otherwise obligated the sum
.of SIX HUNDRER AND ONE THOUSANND DOLLARS
:s 32partment. , . . $1,200.00”
    The total sum appropriated m d e r Chapter VI is increased
by $1,000.

                                  S. S. ROBISON,
                         Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
                        Military Governor of Santo Domingo.

Santo Domingo, D. R.
Septeniber 14, 1921.
